summary: Multi-timeframe data collection feature testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed for all new endpoints. Frontend: NIA page displays Multi-Timeframe Data panel with NEW badge, collection progress view (since collection was running), and Historical Simulations panel with bar_size selector working correctly.

details: POST /api/ib-collector/multi-timeframe-collection validates bar_size and lookback parameters
Returns 400 error for invalid bar_size values
Returns 400 error for invalid lookback values
Returns success/already running message for valid requests
GET /api/ib-collector/collection-presets returns 7 presets
Includes Scalping (1 min), Day Trading (5 mins), Swing, Position Trading, Long-term Analysis, Weekly Investment
Each preset has name, description, bar_size, lookback, collection_type, estimated fields
GET /api/ib-collector/timeframe-stats returns stats by timeframe
Shows unique_symbols, total_bars, date_range per bar_size
Currently shows 8,451 symbols, 201,349 bars for 1 day timeframe
SimulationConfigRequest model has bar_size field (default: 1 day)
Historical Simulations panel shows bar size selector: 1 Min, 5 Min, Daily
Quick Test and Market-Wide buttons functional
Panel header shows 'Multi-Timeframe Data' with NEW badge
Displays collection progress when job running: 'Collecting 5 mins... 95%'
Shows '1 timeframes' indicator
Panel is expandable with bar_size, lookback, collection_type selectors (when not collecting)
Panel shows '10 backtests completed' status
Simulation Settings toggle expands to show bar size options
Bar sizes: 1 Min (Scalp), 5 Min (Intraday), Daily (Swing)
Stats: 10 Backtests, 39% Avg Win Rate, 20 Total Trades
Recent backtests list shows job details with symbols, trades, win rate, P&L

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-timeframe collection endpoint properly validates all parameters
Collection presets provide excellent UX for quick configuration
Timeframe stats aggregation uses MongoDB pipeline correctly
Frontend Multi-Timeframe panel correctly shows progress view when collection running
Historical Simulations panel bar_size selector integrated properly
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing simulation jobs and collection data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-timeframe collection feature fully functional. Key data-testids: nav-nia, multi-timeframe-panel-toggle, bar-size-{value}, lookback-{value}, collection-type-{value}, start-collection-btn, show-presets-btn, sim-bar-size-{value}, toggle-sim-settings, quick-simulation-btn, market-wide-backtest-btn. Note: When collection job is running, Multi-Timeframe panel shows progress view instead of selectors.
